overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a foggy historic courtyard resembling New Orleans French Quarter architecture. The player character walks around a central fountain, explores narrow passages between brick buildings, enters a structure, ascends a wooden staircase, and emerges onto an upper balcony overlooking the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic courtyard with central tiered fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the courtyard fountain observing the historic architecture and balconies

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with statue centerpiece
row of arched walkways on ground floor of building
decorative iron railings on upper floors with hanging plants
wet cobblestone paving with scattered leaves

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy historic courtyard centered around an ornate tiered fountain. The camera circles the fountain, revealing surrounding buildings with arched walkways and wrought iron balconies adorned with ferns. The atmosphere is quiet and misty with falling particles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between historic buildings with outdoor seating

events.description: enters narrow passage from open courtyard, light decreases significantly
encounters child standing in the narrow passage ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage toward a child standing in the way

notable_agents.action: child in grey clothing standing in the narrow passage looking toward camera

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence along left side of passage
wooden bench with closed umbrella beside it
large plant with bright red leaves

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open courtyard into a narrow enclosed passage between buildings. Light drops as the space becomes more confined. A child stands in the path ahead near an outdoor seating area with benches and tropical plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alley with dead end and doorways

events.description: reaches dead end and turns around to walk back through passage
camera looks up revealing sky visible between tall brick buildings

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the narrow alley, turning around and walking back

entered.detail: white painted door at end of narrow passage
red brick wall with white window frames

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds to the end of the narrow brick alley where a white door marks the dead end. After a brief look upward between the buildings, the camera turns and begins walking back through the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from courtyard to interior stairwell

events.description: exits narrow passage back into the open courtyard
interior lighting becomes dominant as entering covered stairwell

agents.ego_description: returning to the courtyard and entering the building through an arched doorway

entered.detail: large arched entry leading into building interior
wooden stairs with white railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the narrow passage back into the courtyard, briefly showing the fountain again, then enters the building through a large arched doorway. Inside, a wooden staircase with white railings leads upward into a dimly lit interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior wooden staircase with brick walls

events.description: sunlight streams through upper windows illuminating the wooden stairs
reaches top of stairs and turns toward balcony doors

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase toward the upper floor, light increasing

entered.detail: exposed red brick walls lining the stairwell
black exterior lantern mounted on interior wall

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wooden staircase within the brick-walled interior. Natural light gradually increases as upper windows come into view, casting dramatic light patterns on the stairs. The segment ends as the camera reaches the top landing.

events.description: exits through french doors onto exterior balcony
woman seen standing on adjacent balcony overlooking courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking onto the balcony and observing the courtyard below and neighboring balconies

notable_agents.action: woman in period dress standing on adjacent balcony looking out over courtyard
man in white shirt standing on distant balcony

entered.detail: white painted french doors opening onto balcony
wrought iron railing with decorative patterns
view looking down at the fountain and courtyard from above
large green ferns in planters on balcony

segments.scene_description: The camera exits through french doors onto an upper balcony, revealing a view of the courtyard below. Potted ferns line the balcony while a woman in period dress stands on an adjacent balcony. The camera pans to show the surrounding historic buildings and other figures on distant balconies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a misty historic courtyard and ascends through a building to reveal an elevated perspective of the grounds. It begins by circling an ornate tiered fountain amidst arched walkways and wrought iron balconies before gliding into a narrow, dim brick passage where a child stands near tropical plants. After reaching a dead-end white door and turning back, the camera exits the alley and passes the fountain once more to enter a large arched doorway. The scene then shifts indoors as the camera climbs a wooden staircase, with the dim interior gradually brightening through dramatic light patterns from upper windows. Finally, the camera emerges through French doors onto an upper balcony, panning across potted ferns and figures in period dress to overlook the entire courtyard and its surrounding historic architecture.
